title: cirsium ashinokuraense
intro: Cirsium ashinokuraense, also known as Ashinokura thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. In terms of herbal preparations, Cirsium ashinokuraense can be consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
